extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity. I counted only the Against rows: criminal proceedings are 2 against the Company plus 34 against the Promoter, with Directors and Subsidiaries nil; statutory/regulatory proceedings are 4 against the Company, 1 against the Promoter and 1 against Subsidiaries; tax proceedings counted for the Company and Subsidiaries are 17 and 2 respectively, excluding the Promoter's 817 personal tax proceedings and all By rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹1,412.72 million plus ₹11.38 million, or ₹1,424.10 million = ₹142.41 crore; the source unit is ₹ million. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as of September 30, 2023 without a stated Total row, so the disclosed line items were summed: ₹78.20 million + ₹34.55 million + ₹180.38 million + nil = ₹293.13 million = ₹29.313 crore. The company-wide Top 5 customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2023, is 60.49% of revenue from operations; the Services-segment percentage of 73.20% was not used. All crore conversions use ₹10 million = ₹1 crore.
